name: Alethkar
startIntroPart2: Dalinar Kholin, bloodthirsty warlord, scourer of cities, and now founder of the Knights Radiant. Lead your nation into a great future!
declaringWar: You have drawn the Blackthorn's ire. Make your peace.
attacked: The Alethi will not fall to the likes of you!
defeated: Life before death, strength before weakness, journey before desti-...
introduction: Greetings. Have you read The Way of Kings?
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Infighting will not serve us against the desolations to come.
tradeRequest: You would be wise to take me up on this offer.
uniques: [military units] gains the [Cover I] status for [1] turn(s) <upon defeating a [Military] unit>
